events.event_description: Establishment of U.S. diplomatic relations with Saint Lucia at the legation level, with Sally Angela Shelton presenting credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Sally Angela Shelton, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1979-05-17. Credentials presented: 1979-06-11.

events.event_description: Elevation of U.S. mission to Saint Lucia from legation to embassy level, with Milan D Bish presenting credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Milan D Bish, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1981-11-23. Credentials presented: 1981-12-15.
